chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6393 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on Misc. No.28556/2024 2. For orders on Misc. No.28557/2024 3. For orders on Misc. No.28558/2024 4. For hearing of main case 24.12.2024 Mr. Faheem Ali Siddiqui, advocate for the petitioner 1. Granted. 2-4. This petition has challenged an ejectment notice dated 06.12.2024, issued by the Government of Pakistan, office of the Deputy Administrator, Evacuee Trust Property. Notice alleges that the petitioner has sublet the premises and further made unauthorized addition and alteration. Learned counsel was confronted as to why the notice has not been responded to and what is the vested / constitutional right under which writ jurisdiction is preferred he remained unable to assist on this count. Petition found to be misconceived is dismissed in limine. Judge Judge Amjad
